   "reasoning": "I'm sick of empty promises, so I'm only backing interventions that put money directly in students' pockets or hire more staff to actually help us. Scholarships are a no-brainer - if I didn't have to work after school, I might actually be able to focus on my studies. Attendance mandates are just a joke, though - like, what are they gonna do, punish me for not being able to afford to be there?",
